SourceProxy.name: MotionDetector
SourceProxy.label: Motion Detector

Documentation.short_help: Detect motion points in lidar frame
Documentation.long_help: Motion detector to estimate motion probability of each points in frame and to extract clusters on motion points

SourceProxy.Documentation: Motion detector filter estimates motion probability of points in lidar frame by building a spherical depth map with gaussian mixture model. It also extracts clusters on motion points and gives the information of each cluster.
